plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-239 RP07.P02.M03.S01-RP07.P02.M04.S15 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-239 implements descriptor-only coverage of the full RP07.P02.M03 primary service slice (including golden fixture binding, Hermes service evidence, and Claude service review prompt) and the M04 secondary workflow head (40 rows across two sections) with Hermes evidence, Claude review packet, and CP00-240 handoff, without opening search runtime, OCR runtime, index runtime, embedding runtime, review/approval route runtime, rollback/retry runtime, lock acquisition, idempotency persistence, state writes, object storage, command runtime execution, Hermes runtime receipts, email, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-239 is a descriptor-only RP07 (Search OCR and Index) service-slice closeout pack covering 40 units (RP07.P02.M03.S01-RP07.P02.M04.S15) as two sections: M03 Primary Implementation Slice (25 rows) and M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (15 rows). The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly NOT asserted: manifest.json reports production_ready=false / status "implemented_pending_review" and command-evidence.json reports production_ready=false / "implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout"; the Hermes production_ready_candidate=true (coverage + slice validations pass) is explicitly gated behind post-review closeout and human final approval, matching the authority boundary. Internal consistency is fully verified across the registry binding (SEARCH_CORE_CP239_PACK_BINDING), requirements (SEARCH_CORE_CP239_REQUIREMENTS), contract projection (current_pack, service_slice_descriptor, cp239_requirements, cp239_no_write_attestation, historical_pack_bindings tail = CP00-239), the closeout-pack-plan.json entry, and the manifest plan_binding_snapshot — all agree on Risk B, 40 units, range, upstream CP00-238, next CP00-240, next_subphase RP07.P02.M04.S16. Deliverable distribution matches exactly (contract:2, implementation:17, security_audit:4, ui:6, claude_review:3, failure_recovery:2, test:4, fixture:1, hermes_evidence:1 = 40) and is enforced by validateSearchCoreCp239Coverage. Descriptor-only / no-write / no-real-data boundaries hold: service.js builds only frozen descriptor objects with every runtime/write flag false (search/OCR/index/embedding dispatch, permission/audit evaluation, db rows, object storage, Hermes runtime receipt, state transitions, idempotency, lock acquisition, rollback/retry, unit-test/integration/command runtime, real fixture loading), and a source sweep found no fs/network/db/child_process/process.env usage in packages/search/src. No-leak guards (permission decision detail, audit event/hint body, blocked-claim detail, Hermes packet body, fixture payload, validation error detail, lock token, raw payload, unauthorized data) are excluded in row extras and enforced by validateSearchCoreCp239ServiceSliceDescriptor. Authority boundary is intact: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, claude_packet.read_only=true; the manifest mirrors this (claude_not_final_approver=true, enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation=true). Hermes/control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling (descriptor-only evidence packet, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false; validator .mjs reads files and asserts only) — not product runtime. Review-hardening evidence is valid: readiness-report auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1435-byte stdout, well-formed JSON result, no auth failure / 0-byte / malformed / fenced / tool-call-shaped output), tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, forbidden_tools_present=false, summary-only review correctly prohibited (Risk B + security/audit + review deliverables), prompt within size limit, source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used. Coverage is backed by 3 dedicated CP239 tests in model.test.js plus inline validator assertions, with command-evidence recording all required validation commands at exit 0. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. Note (non-defect): index.js uses export * so CP239 exports flow through without editing it (explaining its presence in active refs but not the dirty list); evidence_refs to claude-review-result.json/adjudication.md/construction-inspection.json are produced post-review by the hardened sequence and are expected to be absent at this review stage. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not final approver; human final approval remains required for the enterprise trust claim.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-239 search core service slice descriptor pack
